examples_json: [{"en":"My father is a doctor.","zh":"我爸爸是医生。"}]

description: does not缩写。第三人称否定助动词。
do的第三人称单数形式。也用作疑问句助动词。
examples_json: [{"en":"Does he like sports?","zh":"他喜欢运动吗？"}]
[{"en":"She goes to school by bus.","zh":"她坐公交上学。"}]
[{"en":"He watches TV after dinner.","zh":"他晚饭后看电视。"}]
[{"en":"He works in a hospital.","zh":"他在医院工作。"}]
[{"en":"I like coffee but she likes tea.","zh":"我喜欢咖啡但是她喜欢茶。"}]
[{"en":"Their house is big.","zh":"他们的房子很大。"}]
